content: react-router-dom 7.18.1 is the latest (latest tag). v7 is stable. Use createHashRouter(routes) + RouterProvider for GitHub Pages SPA — this is the recommended v7 API over the legacy HashRouter component. Create router outside React tree. Import from 'react-router' (not 'react-router-dom' which re-exports). v6.30.4 is tagged 'version-6' for those needing v6. For this project, use createHashRouter from react-router-dom@7.
